turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: Hello, I'm so sorry to bother you — would you mind helping me reset my password when you have a moment?

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: Of course, it's no bother at all. I'd be happy to help you with that right now.

turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: Thank you so much, that's very kind. I really appreciate your patience with me.

turns.speaker: Agent
turns.text: You're very welcome. All set — please don't hesitate to reach out again.

turns.speaker: Customer
turns.text: That's wonderful, thank you again for being so helpful and courteous.
